question: Will I get a full refund including shipping if I return my order?
reference_answer:
The seller refunds you for the returned products and the cheapest delivery option. However, you may not receive the full amount you paid for the purchase.
In some cases, the seller may reduce the refund amount ― for example, if the product has been damaged in transport or has clear signs of use. If the seller refunds you only partially, you will find a justification for that in an email.
The seller is not obliged to refund you for all the additional expenses. For example, if you choose a different delivery option than the cheapest one offered by the seller, they will refund you the cost of the cheapest option.
contexts:
The seller refunds you for the returned products and the cheapest delivery option. However, you may not receive the full amount you paid for the purchase.
In some cases, the seller may reduce the refund amount ― for example, if the product has been damaged in transport or has clear signs of use. If the seller refunds you only partially, you will find a justification for that in an email.
The seller is not obliged to refund you for all the additional expenses. For example, if you choose a different delivery option than the cheapest one offered by the seller, they will refund you the cost of the cheapest option.

question: Can I use multiple delivery addresses for one order or just one?
reference_answer: Select one delivery address and one set of VAT invoice details for the whole order.
contexts: Select one delivery address and one set of VAT invoice details for the whole order.

question: Why does my payment status show as canceled or pending on HopShop?
reference_answer:
Your payment may have the Canceled status if:
the payment has not been made through HopShop Finance within 10 days of selecting the payment method
you have canceled your payment (in this case, we will refund you to the bank account you paid from)
the bank has not accepted your payment
a PayU S.A. or PayPro S.A. employee has canceled your payment (it may happen if the payment is suspected to be incorrect).
If you cancel your payment, the seller will not get funds. Remember that the seller may still expect you to finalize the transaction.
What to do next
If the payment is Canceled and your bank account has not been charged, you can retry payment. To do it, open the Purchase History tab and click [retry payment] by the unpaid order.
If the payment is Canceled and your bank account has been charged, you will get a refund to the same bank account.
Note
Every payment starts with the Pending status.
If the status does not change, check if your bank account has been charged. If not, retry the payment. To do it:
Open the Purchase History tab.
Click [retry payment] by the unpaid order.
Select the delivery and payment method ― you can choose different methods than before.
contexts:

a PayU S.A. or PayPro S.A. employee has canceled your payment (it may happen if the payment is suspected to be incorrect).

question: How can I find the seller's email and phone number after I make a purchase?
reference_answer:
After completing each transaction, we will email you the seller's contact information, including their email address and phone number.
After signing in, you can also check that information:
before making the purchase — on the offer page, in the Contact sub-section of the About Seller section (if the seller provided contact details)
after making the purchase — when you click [purchase details] next to a given order in the Purchase History tab.
contexts:
After completing each transaction, we will email you the seller's contact information, including their email address and phone number.
After signing in, you can also check that information:
before making the purchase — on the offer page, in the Contact sub-section of the About Seller section (if the seller provided contact details)
after making the purchase — when you click [purchase details] next to a given order in the Purchase History tab.

question: What should I do if my parcel was damaged when I picked it up?
reference_answer:
If you notice the damage in the pick-up point:
do not collect the parcel — it will be returned to the seller or
collect the parcel but complete the damage report (the document is available in Polish) together with the pick-up point employee, and file a complaint.
If you collect the parcel from a parcel locker and the package is damaged — report it through the app. Click [file a delivery complaint] in the purchase details.
If you notice the damage after you have collected the parcel, complete the damage report (the document is available in Polish), and file a complaint.
contexts:
If you notice the damage in the pick-up point:
do not collect the parcel — it will be returned to the seller or
collect the parcel but complete the damage report (the document is available in Polish) together with the pick-up point employee, and file a complaint.
If you collect the parcel from a parcel locker and the package is damaged — report it through the app. Click [file a delivery complaint] in the purchase details.
If you notice the damage after you have collected the parcel, complete the damage report (the document is available in Polish), and file a complaint.

question: How do I sign up using my Google or Facebook account?
reference_answer:
Open the sign in page.
Select signing in through Facebook or Google.
Sign in to your Facebook or Google account. Then, we will automatically redirect you to the registration page.
Determine whether you are over 18 years old. If not, provide your exact date of birth. You will hold a Junior account which will be transformed into a regular account once you turn 18.
Accept the HopShop Terms & Conditions and click [register].
Done! We will give you a default username― you can change it in the Account details tab.
contexts:

Accept the HopShop Terms & Conditions and click [register].
Done! We will give you a default username― you can change it in the Account details tab.

question: How can I find my parcel's tracking number and check its delivery status on HopShop?
reference_answer: You can check the delivery status of your parcel in: the Purchase History tab ― click [purchase details] under the order you want to track, and then, [expand purchase details] the email notification the HopShop app ― on the purchase list, in the Purchase details section and in the My Parcels tab the My Parcels tab ― on your computer. provided that these 2 conditions are met: you complete the delivery and payment form while paying for your purchase through HopShop Finance the seller enters the tracking number in the Payment card. If those conditions are met, you can find the following basic order information in the Purchase details of the Purchase History tab: the seller's details the offer title and ID date of purchase the selected carrier the tracking number the current order status (for example, Pending dispatch, Dispatched, In transit, Pick up your parcel). You can also ask the seller to provide you with the tracking number, and then, track your parcel on the carrier's website: Poczta Polska DHL UPS GLS ORLEN InPost DPD Pocztex FedEx TNT Express Geis DB Schenker Raben.

If those conditions are met, you can find the following basic order information in the Purchase details of the Purchase History tab: the seller's details the offer title and ID date of purchase the selected carrier the tracking number the current order status (for example, Pending dispatch, Dispatched, In transit, Pick up your parcel). question: How will I receive my refund from the seller?
reference_answer: The refund method depends on the payment method you chose for your purchase. Keep reading to learn how the refund works for each method.
contexts: The refund method depends on the payment method you chose for your purchase. Keep reading to learn how the refund works for each method.

question: How long does it take to get a refund for a wire transfer, and what if I used a postal order?
reference_answer: You will get the refund within 3 business days to the bank account you provided. If you have issued the transfer in a post office or at the bank, PayU will email you and ask you to provide details necessary to issue a refund. The money transferred with a postal order are booked in the account within 14 days.
contexts: You will get the refund within 3 business days to the bank account you provided. If you have issued the transfer in a post office or at the bank, PayU will email you and ask you to provide details necessary to issue a refund. The money transferred with a postal order are booked in the account within 14 days.

question: How is the estimated delivery time calculated on HopShop?
reference_answer:
For every offer on HopShop and on selected purchase steps, we display estimated time of delivery. Thanks to that, you can check when, most probably, your parcel will reach you or the pick-up point.
Estimated delivery time is influenced by:
dispatch time ― it is the estimated time the seller needs to prepare a parcel for dispatch, counted from the seller receiving the payment to the dispatch
transit time ― it is the time when the parcel is being transported to you by the carrier.
contexts:
For every offer on HopShop and on selected purchase steps, we display estimated time of delivery. Thanks to that, you can check when, most probably, your parcel will reach you or the pick-up point.
Estimated delivery time is influenced by:
dispatch time ― it is the estimated time the seller needs to prepare a parcel for dispatch, counted from the seller receiving the payment to the dispatch
transit time ― it is the time when the parcel is being transported to you by the carrier.

question: What happens to my gift card if I return an order I paid for with it?
reference_answer: If you return an order for which you have paid with a gift card, we will increase its value by the refund amount. We will assign it to the HopShop account used to make the purchase. The terms of use and expiration date of the card will not change. If the seller issues the refund after the gift card is expired, you can use it within 14 days of the refund. You will find the gift card in the Coupons tab and during transaction finalization in the (Pay less) section.
contexts: If you return an order for which you have paid with a gift card, we will increase its value by the refund amount. We will assign it to the HopShop account used to make the purchase. The terms of use and expiration date of the card will not change. If the seller issues the refund after the gift card is expired, you can use it within 14 days of the refund. You will find the gift card in the Coupons tab and during transaction finalization in the (Pay less) section.

question: How can I reorder a single product from my past purchases?
reference_answer:
Go to the Purchase History tab.
Click [purchase details] next to the selected order.
Under each product in that order, you will see 2 buttons:
[to cart] — click to add the product to cart
[buy now] — click to go to the form where you can select the delivery option and payment method.
If the offer with the product you selected is already inactive, we will show you other offers with the same product.
contexts:

Under each product in that order, you will see 2 buttons:
[to cart] — click to add the product to cart
[buy now] — click to go to the form where you can select the delivery option and payment method.
If the offer with the product you selected is already inactive, we will show you other offers with the same product.

question: How will I be notified when my refund is processed?
reference_answer: We will let you know by email when the seller issues the refund. In the email, you will find information about the purchase which the refund concerns, as well as the refund amount, and method. You can find the refund information in the details of your purchase.
contexts: We will let you know by email when the seller issues the refund. In the email, you will find information about the purchase which the refund concerns, as well as the refund amount, and method. You can find the refund information in the details of your purchase.

question: How can I open a Discussion if I canceled an order paid through HopShop Finance and haven’t received a refund?
reference_answer: If you have paid for your order through HopShop Finance, you can open a Discussion by yourself. You can do it in the Purchase History tab by clicking [report a problem with the purchase] under a given order. If you paid for your order outside HopShop Finance (for example, with a wire transfer), we can open a Discussion on your behalf. In this case, contact us. When you can open a Discussion for a canceled order You can do it when you cancel an order you have paid for through HopShop Finance and the seller: has not refunded you has not refunded your whole payment has delivered the order to you (even though you had canceled it) and you want to file a complaint.
contexts: If you have paid for your order through HopShop Finance, you can open a Discussion by yourself. You can do it in the Purchase History tab by clicking [report a problem with the purchase] under a given order. If you paid for your order outside HopShop Finance (for example, with a wire transfer), we can open a Discussion on your behalf. In this case, contact us. When you can open a Discussion for a canceled order You can do it when you cancel an order you have paid for through HopShop Finance and the seller: has not refunded you has not refunded your whole payment has delivered the order to you (even though you had canceled it) and you want to file a complaint.

question: Why might my actual delivery time be different from the estimated delivery time?
reference_answer: We calculate the estimated delivery time based on the available data. It may differ from the actual delivery time because the algorithm cannot predict random incidents or unplanned delays of sellers and carriers.
contexts: We calculate the estimated delivery time based on the available data. It may differ from the actual delivery time because the algorithm cannot predict random incidents or unplanned delays of sellers and carriers.

question: Who is responsible if an item is damaged during delivery when buying from an entrepreneur?
reference_answer:
If a consumer buys an item from an entrepreneur, then the entrepreneur (in this case: the seller) is responsible for the risk of the item being damaged or lost until the item is collected by the buyer.
Exception
When a buyer chooses a different carrier than those offered by the entrepreneur (for example, they will ask to ship the item by post, although the seller has only offered courier delivery), the responsibility for the parcel passes to the buyer.
contexts:

Exception

question: What should I do if my pick-up code isn’t working at the parcel locker?
reference_answer: Firstly, make sure you enter the correct pick-up code. You can find it in the order details in the My Parcels or Purchase History tabs. If it does not help — call the number that is directly below the parcel locker's screen or click [contact us] below this article.
contexts: Firstly, make sure you enter the correct pick-up code. You can find it in the order details in the My Parcels or Purchase History tabs. If it does not help — call the number that is directly below the parcel locker's screen or click [contact us] below this article.

question: What happens if I frequently cancel or don't pay for my purchases on HopShop?
reference_answer: If you have failed to pay for the purchase or collect a POD parcel again ― the seller may think you do this on purpose and ask us for help. We will check if you do not violate our rules. This is why you should inform the seller about any payment delay or order cancelation. This way, you can avoid potential misunderstanding. We work hard to keep transactions on HopShop safe. We monitor them with our tools for internal use. If you often cancel your orders, we might ask you for an explanation. How to open a Discussion and resolve an issue with the seller If you have not succeeded in contacting the seller or solving the problem with them, you can open a Discussion. You can open only one Discussion per transaction. If you close the Discussion, you can re-open it only once. You can do it within 2 years of making a given purchase.
contexts: If you have failed to pay for the purchase or collect a POD parcel again ― the seller may think you do this on purpose and ask us for help. We will check if you do not violate our rules. This is why you should inform the seller about any payment delay or order cancelation. This way, you can avoid potential misunderstanding. We work hard to keep transactions on HopShop safe. We monitor them with our tools for internal use. If you often cancel your orders, we might ask you for an explanation. How to open a Discussion and resolve an issue with the seller If you have not succeeded in contacting the seller or solving the problem with them, you can open a Discussion. You can open only one Discussion per transaction. If you close the Discussion, you can re-open it only once. You can do it within 2 years of making a given purchase.

question: What do I need to do to pick up my parcel from a pick-up point?
reference_answer: When you get the pick-up code — go to the pick-up point, provide the employee with the code, and collect your parcel.
contexts: When you get the pick-up code — go to the pick-up point, provide the employee with the code, and collect your parcel.

question: How long does it take to get a BLIK refund and where can I see it in my bank account?
reference_answer: You will get the refund to your bank account. For the majority of banks, you will see the refund details in your account history below the date of payment for the purchase. You will be refunded within 3 business days. ?
contexts: You will get the refund to your bank account. For the majority of banks, you will see the refund details in your account history below the date of payment for the purchase. You will be refunded within 3 business days. ?

question: How do I pay for my order using PayPal and how does currency conversion work?
reference_answer: When you are ready to pay for your order, go to the delivery and payment form. In the Payment method section, select PayPal. Click [buy and pay]. You will be redirected to the PayPal website. Follow the instructions there to pay. Done! How currency conversion works Depending on the currency you choose to pay in and the currency of the funds on your bank account: if the payment currency and your bank account currency are the same ― you are charged the price in this currency if the payment currency and your bank account currency are different ― the card issuer converts the payment into your bank account currency. Examples You want to pay in EUR. The currency of money on your card is EUR. When you pay, you will pay in EUR ― with no currency conversion needed. You want to pay in PLN. The currency of the funds on your card is EUR. When you pay, the bank will convert the payment currency from PLN into EUR. The conversion rate is calculated by PayU ― the payment service provider ― and updated daily.
contexts: When you are ready to pay for your order, go to the delivery and payment form. In the Payment method section, select PayPal. Click [buy and pay]. You will be redirected to the PayPal website. Follow the instructions there to pay. Done! How currency conversion works Depending on the currency you choose to pay in and the currency of the funds on your bank account: if the payment currency and your bank account currency are the same ― you are charged the price in this currency if the payment currency and your bank account currency are different ― the card issuer converts the payment into your bank account currency. Examples You want to pay in EUR. The currency of money on your card is EUR. When you pay, you will pay in EUR ― with no currency conversion needed. You want to pay in PLN. The currency of the funds on your card is EUR. When you pay, the bank will convert the payment currency from PLN into EUR. The conversion rate is calculated by PayU ― the payment service provider ― and updated daily.

question: How can I change my parcel locker or pick-up point before the seller ships my order?
reference_answer: If the seller has yet to dispatch your parcel — contact them and ask them to change the pick-up point or parcel locker. You can find the seller's contact information in the email purchase confirmation.
contexts: If the seller has yet to dispatch your parcel — contact them and ask them to change the pick-up point or parcel locker. You can find the seller's contact information in the email purchase confirmation.

question: What are the options for returning a HopShop Delivery parcel?
reference_answer:
You can do it in several ways:
within Smart! free of charge
outside Smart! free of charge
with the payable DPD and InPost return options
on your own at your expense.
You can return HopShop Delivery parcels the same way as regular parcels. Learn how to do it.
Having issues with the return? Click [contact us] under this article and describe your issue — we are here to help you!

question: How long will my parcel be held at the pick-up point before being sent back?
reference_answer:
The parcel will wait for you for:
2 working days — in HopShop One pick-up points and parcel lockers
3 working days — in ORLEN Paczka pick-up points and parcel lockers.
We will remind you about the parcel on the second day. If you do not collect your parcel on time, we will return it to the seller, and change the parcel status to Parcel sent back to sender.
contexts:

question: What should I do if I'm unsure about my parcel status?
reference_answer: If you have any doubts regarding what your parcel status means — click [contact us] below this article.
contexts: If you have any doubts regarding what your parcel status means — click [contact us] below this article.

question: What happens if the parcel locker has no available space for my package?
reference_answer: We will redirect your parcel to a different parcel locker or pick-up point and send you a notification.
contexts: We will redirect your parcel to a different parcel locker or pick-up point and send you a notification.

question: Can I open a Discussion for a purchase made more than two years ago?
reference_answer:
If 2 years (730 days) have passed from making the purchase, it is impossible to open a Discussion.
If your order included a purchase in several offers, you can indicate only the offer for which the problem occurred.
contexts:
If 2 years (730 days) have passed from making the purchase, it is impossible to open a Discussion.
If your order included a purchase in several offers, you can indicate only the offer for which the problem occurred.

question: How can I collect my parcel from a parcel locker using a pick-up code or the HopShop app?
reference_answer: You can do it in 2 ways: directly at the locker — enter the pick-up code on the locker screen or scan the QR code remotely with the HopShop app. If you select ORLEN Paczka delivery options within HopShop Delivery — you will collect your parcel using the HopShop app or with a code only.
contexts: You can do it in 2 ways: directly at the locker — enter the pick-up code on the locker screen or scan the QR code remotely with the HopShop app. If you select ORLEN Paczka delivery options within HopShop Delivery — you will collect your parcel using the HopShop app or with a code only.

question: How can I share my HopShop Delivery pick-up code with someone else using the app?
reference_answer:
You can share the pick-up code of an HopShop Delivery parcel with others using our mobile app.
From the [Purchase History](https://HopShop.pl/moje-HopShop/zakupy/kupione or the My parcels tab, go to Purchase details and click [share pick-up code].
Choose the way you want to share your pick-up code (for example, SMS).
We will automatically redirect you to the app you choose and add the content of the message in it with information about the pick-up code and the address of the parcel locker or pick-up point.
Remember that when you share a pick-up code with another person, you take responsibility for transferring to that person the right to collect your parcel.
contexts:
You can share the pick-up code of an HopShop Delivery parcel with others using our mobile app.
From the [Purchase History](https://HopShop.pl/moje-HopShop/zakupy/kupione or the My parcels tab, go to Purchase details and click [share pick-up code].
Choose the way you want to share your pick-up code (for example, SMS).
We will automatically redirect you to the app you choose and add the content of the message in it with information about the pick-up code and the address of the parcel locker or pick-up point.
Remember that when you share a pick-up code with another person, you take responsibility for transferring to that person the right to collect your parcel.

If you paid for your order with: Mastercard ― you will get the refund within 3 business days Visa ― you will get the refund within 7 business days.

question: How can I find out which delivery options are available for an item on HopShop?
reference_answer: When buying on HopShop, you have a wide range of delivery options. The seller specifies delivery options available for a given offer. Go to the Delivery and payment section to check what delivery options are available for the offer you are interested in.

question: Can I withdraw from the agreement if my account is older than 14 days?
reference_answer:
To withdraw from the agreement, submit this application. You will then get a confirmation email from us.
You will not be able to submit the application for an account older than 14 days or submit multiple applications for the same account. If you try to do it, we will display a message with a hint.
You will lose access to your account immediately after submitting the application. We will log you out and you will not sign in again.
What happens next
Usually, we consider the application right away ― within minutes. It may take us up to 7 days.
If there were no sales or purchases on your account ― we will completely and irreversibly delete your personal details from our systems.
If you have made a purchase or listed an offer on that account ― we will store your data until that purchase or sale has been processed. In that case, you may use the second option: termination of agreement with HopShop.
If we find that you do not meet the conditions above (for example, you made a purchase or listed an offer on that account) ― we will reject your application and you will regain access to your account. We will inform you about it by email. If that is the case, you can use the other option ― terminating the agreement.
contexts:
To withdraw from the agreement, submit this application. You will then get a confirmation email from us.
You will not be able to submit the application for an account older than 14 days or submit multiple applications for the same account. If you try to do it, we will display a message with a hint.
You will lose access to your account immediately after submitting the application. We will log you out and you will not sign in again.
What happens next
Usually, we consider the application right away ― within minutes. It may take us up to 7 days.
If there were no sales or purchases on your account ― we will completely and irreversibly delete your personal details from our systems.
If you have made a purchase or listed an offer on that account ― we will store your data until that purchase or sale has been processed. In that case, you may use the second option: termination of agreement with HopShop.
If we find that you do not meet the conditions above (for example, you made a purchase or listed an offer on that account) ― we will reject your application and you will regain access to your account. We will inform you about it by email. If that is the case, you can use the other option ― terminating the agreement.

question: Can I split payment for multiple orders from different sellers?
reference_answer:
In the Purchase History tab, tick only those orders you want to pay for and click [pay]. You cannot split payment for an order from one seller.
How to pay for your order ― information for buyers outside Poland
Before you pay, you can choose in which currency you want to pay ― the Polish zloty (PLN) or the Euro (EUR) ― in the localization settings.
You can pay for your purchases on HopShop with:
a payment card
PayPal ― only when you pay in EUR.
Payment by card
You can pay with a card if you hold a MasterCard or a VISA payment card. Check how to pay with a card.
contexts:
In the Purchase History tab, tick only those orders you want to pay for and click [pay]. You cannot split payment for an order from one seller.
How to pay for your order ― information for buyers outside Poland
Before you pay, you can choose in which currency you want to pay ― the Polish zloty (PLN) or the Euro (EUR) ― in the localization settings.

question: How long does a seller have to respond to my complaint before it is considered upheld?
reference_answer: When the seller receives your complaint, they have 14 days to address it. If they do not do it by the due date, your complaint is considered upheld.
contexts: When the seller receives your complaint, they have 14 days to address it. If they do not do it by the due date, your complaint is considered upheld.

question: How can I enable sign-in with my email and password?
reference_answer: If you want to be able to sign in to your account with an email address and password, too ― set a password in the Sign-in and Password tab.
contexts: If you want to be able to sign in to your account with an email address and password, too ― set a password in the Sign-in and Password tab.

question: What are the ways to contact a seller on HopShop?
reference_answer: You can contact the seller on HopShop in a few ways: by clicking [Ask a question] on the offer page directly, with their contact information through the Message Center by opening a Discussion.
contexts: You can contact the seller on HopShop in a few ways: by clicking [Ask a question] on the offer page directly, with their contact information through the Message Center by opening a Discussion.

question: Where can I find the estimated delivery time for an offer?
reference_answer:
We display the estimated delivery time individually for each offer in a few locations on different purchase stages:
on the offer list
on the offer page
if you click [delivery] on the offer page
in the payment and delivery form
on the thank you page
in the order details you can find in the Purchase History tab
in selected sections of the recommended offers ― if delivery time is up to 2 business days
in the Buy and Pay section ― if it is available in the offer.
We display estimated delivery time as:
(today), (tomorrow) or (in 2 days) – in selected locations if delivery time does not exceed 2 business days
a specific date or time range ― if the delivery time is 7 days or fewer; for example:
(Mon. Dec. 2 in a pick-up point)
(Mon. Dec. 2 ― Wed. Dec. 4 in your house)
a number of days ― if delivery time is longer than 7 days; for example:
in 13 ― 31 days in your house)
(immediately) ―for email deliveries and parcels for personal pick-up from the seller.
Additional information
You can filter search results by the estimated delivery time.
In exceptional situations, such as Christmas or extreme weather conditions, the estimated delivery time might be longer.
The estimated delivery time accounts for weekends, bank holidays, and sellers’ vacation.
The shipping time depends on the carrier.

question: Can I combine shipping costs when buying multiple items from different sellers?
reference_answer: You cannot merge delivery costs if you buy from different sellers. You choose and pay for a different delivery method for each order among those available in each offer. You can merge delivery costs if you buy from one seller provided that the seller enables you to do so. Depending on the seller’s settings, you will pay: the cost of the most expensive delivery method among the offers you buy in the cost of the cheapest delivery method among the offers you buy in the total cost of delivery from all the offers — the parcels will be dispatched separately.
contexts: You cannot merge delivery costs if you buy from different sellers. You choose and pay for a different delivery method for each order among those available in each offer. You can merge delivery costs if you buy from one seller provided that the seller enables you to do so. Depending on the seller’s settings, you will pay: the cost of the most expensive delivery method among the offers you buy in the cost of the cheapest delivery method among the offers you buy in the total cost of delivery from all the offers — the parcels will be dispatched separately.

question: Why isn't my usual pick-up point showing on the delivery map?
reference_answer: We only display operating pick-up points and parcel lockers on the map. If you cannot see a specific pick-up point, it might be temporarily closed. In that case, choose a different pick-up point or parcel locker.
contexts: We only display operating pick-up points and parcel lockers on the map. If you cannot see a specific pick-up point, it might be temporarily closed. In that case, choose a different pick-up point or parcel locker.

question: Why is my payment still pending after I paid by wire transfer through a third party?
reference_answer:
If you have chosen to pay by a wire transfer in the delivery and payment form, and you order the transfer by a third party (for example, Poczta Polska), the transfer time depends on that party. Such payment is settled within 3 days ― do not retry the payment earlier. If you do, you will cancel your previous payment and it will be transferred back to the institution which made the transfer. If that is the case, and the institution does not have your funds, contact us.
If you pay for your order directly to the seller's bank account ― your payment will have the Pending status for 10 days. After this time, the payment will be canceled automatically, because it has not been made through HopShop.
Your payment method may be unavailable in a given moment - check the time your bank makes online transfers on the bank's website.
There have been technical issues with your payment.
If you have chosen to pay by a wire transfer in the delivery and payment form, and you want to issue an online transfer ― we will generate details on which you should make the transfer.
contexts:

Such payment is settled within 3 days ― do not retry the payment earlier. If you do, you will cancel your previous payment and it will be transferred back to the institution which made the transfer. If that is the case, and the institution does not have your funds, contact us.

Your payment method may be unavailable in a given moment - check the time your bank makes online transfers on the bank's website.
There have been technical issues with your payment.
If you have chosen to pay by a wire transfer in the delivery and payment form, and you want to issue an online transfer ― we will generate details on which you should make the transfer.

question: What should I do if the product I received is defective?
How long does it take to get a refund on my credit card for a Mastercard or Visa?
reference_answer: You will get your refund to the card. In the case of: Mastercard ― you will get the refund within 3 business days Visa ― you will get the refund within 7 business days. For the majority of banks, you will see the refund details in your bank statement or your account history next to the date of payment for the purchase. In some cases you may not see this information immediately after the refund. You might need to wait until the next billing period.
contexts: You will get your refund to the card. In the case of: Mastercard ― you will get the refund within 3 business days Visa ― you will get the refund within 7 business days. For the majority of banks, you will see the refund details in your bank statement or your account history next to the date of payment for the purchase. In some cases you may not see this information immediately after the refund. You might need to wait until the next billing period.

question: What situations allow me to file a complaint about your delivery service?
reference_answer:
You can file a complaint if:
the parcel goes missing
the parcel is damaged in transit
we do not perform the service on time
we provide the service incorrectly.
Who can file a complaint and when
As a buyer, you can file a complaint if:
you have already received your parcel
you have yet to receive the parcel, but the seller has waived the right to pursue claims to you (the document available in Polish)
If, upon parcel receipt, you find a defect or damage unnoticeable on the outside — you have 7 days to file a complaint about such a parcel. In other cases, you can file a complaint against our service up to 12 months from dispatching the parcel.
HopShop Delivery – frequently asked questions
Click on the question to see the answer.

question: How do I close my HopShop account?
reference_answer: You can end your activity on HopShop by: withdrawing from the agreement terminating the agreement.
contexts: You can end your activity on HopShop by: withdrawing from the agreement terminating the agreement.

question: Do I have to use the original packaging or include the receipt when sending a product back for a complaint?
reference_answer: If you send the product back as a part of the complaint, you should secure it properly. Usually, you are not required to return it in the original packaging. You are not required to include the receipt.
contexts: If you send the product back as a part of the complaint, you should secure it properly. Usually, you are not required to return it in the original packaging. You are not required to include the receipt.

question: How can I change the delivery date before my order is dispatched?
reference_answer: If the seller has yet to dispatch your parcel — contact them and ask them to dispatch the parcel on a different date. You can find the seller's contact information in the email purchase confirmation.
contexts: If the seller has yet to dispatch your parcel — contact them and ask them to dispatch the parcel on a different date. You can find the seller's contact information in the email purchase confirmation.

question: What should I do if my order delivery is delayed and I can't contact the seller?
reference_answer:
Dispatching your order may be delayed if you incorrectly complete the delivery and payment form. Check the details you have provided in the form ― find the relevant order in the Purchase History tab and click [purchase details]. If the information is incorrect, contact the seller as soon as possible.
Sometimes, the seller just dispatches the parcel late. Ask the seller when they had dispatched it:
open the Purchase History tab.
under the relevant order, click [purchase details]
you will find their contact information in the seller's details
email or call them.
Note that a parcel dispatched at the end of the week may reach you after the weekend.
You can find a tracking number in the details of the relevant order in the (Your parcel) section. Apart from the tracking number and carrier name, you can also find the parcel status and history there.
You will see a tracking number only if you have paid through HopShop Finance, and the seller has entered the tracking number in the payment card. If they have not done it, or you have paid outside HopShop Finance, ask the seller to send you a tracking number.
If you cannot contact the seller, try resolving the issue through a Discussion.
What to expect as a buyer in a Discussion
In a Discussion:
the seller should reply within 24 hours
if you do not reach an agreement, you can mark the Discussion as Unresolved — we will then join it
after 7 days ― if the Discussion has been opened for the following reason: I have not received the product.
after 14 days ― if the Discussion has been opened for a reason other than I have not received the product
you can ask us for help
if the issue has been resolved, you can close the Discussion at any time.
During the Discussion, the seller may ask you once to mark it as resolved.
We participate in a Discussion as an impartial party and our role is to help you both reach an agreement.
Check the list of your Discussions here.
What Discussions are and how they work
If you have not received your order, the item does not match the description, or the delivery cost does not add up - open a Discussion. There you can describe the issue, and attach all necessary documents, receipts and photos in one place. All of that can make communication with the seller easier and help solve your issue fast.
Open a Discussion and provide all the details. This way, the seller can find all the necessary information about your matter.
What if you resign from the purchase and do not pay for it
If you confirm a purchase or win an auction, you automatically enter into an agreement with the seller. This means you are obliged to pay and collect an item you have bought. If you want to resign from a purchase for some reason, contact the seller ― for example, by email.
